{{Infobox concept
| name = The Paths of Heaven
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Paths of Heaven]] consist of eight rooms filled with illusions of the ancient [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Paths of Heaven]] are eight profound caverns recorded by [[Lindon]] from the bottom of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] sits in front of the [[Paths]] of Heaven.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Paths]] of Heaven are techniques that [[Yerin]] can activate.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
